hypothesis: If a stereochemistry-aware diffusion model (LoQI) is trained on the large ChEMBL3D dataset of AIMNet2-optimized conformers, then it will generate low-energy, stereochemically correct molecular conformers whose energies and geometries are comparable to DFT-optimized structures and superior to existing conformer generators across drug-like molecules including those with up to 25 rotatable bonds and macrocycles.
